content.text:
<user_query>
You are Security lead for BIQc sprint execution. Audit privileged/admin/auth and auditability-related regression risks from frontend guards and backend admin/auth paths. Return: (1) top 8 security regression risks, (2) must-pass security success and failure criteria for sprint releases, (3) guardrails and evidence needed for ELT/Board confidence.
</user_query>
Auditing frontend auth guards and backend admin/auth paths for privileged-access and auditability risks. Searching the codebase.
